name: pr_cep_ex_lazy_churn_nonstream
drl: rule R when exists D(tag == "x") P() then end
_finding: D-161 SCOPE: the ex1 churn in a NON-stream session (no event types) - identical coalescing (3 firings). No per-arrival flush exists to split the pair; the certified D-081 net machinery handles it. Session mode is not the axis; the mid-epoch flush was.
